subject: Ark Angel GK — a heavily armored humanoid figure from Final Fantasy XI, kneeling with a large curved blade
description: A large armored figure crouches low in a dungeon or cave-like space bathed in deep blue-teal light. The armor is heavy black plate with ornate scroll-worked pauldrons and bracers. The figure's face is pale and grey with white hair pulled back, partially visible beneath the armor's collar. A massive curved blade rests on the ground in front of the figure, its tip angled away. In the background to the right, a small dark winged creature — bat-like with red eyes — hovers in the shadows. The setting is clearly cavernous, with large dark stone formations visible behind. The overall palette is dominated by cold blues and blacks with the figure creating a dense silhouette at center-frame.
foreground: armored humanoid kneeling with curved blade, pale face with white hair
background: cavernous dungeon, dark stone formations, hovering winged creature
emotion: still, coiled — menacing readiness in low crouch
